title: Eclipsed Realms Squared
description: Terraria-inspired mechanics/ores/gear with challenging/RPG aspects, incorporating eerie elements and an expansion to exploration.
body:
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b4d1424c821f68f06ebeae6d6184cd3844f282c.png)

## **Content** 

This modpack brings a diverse array of new elements to enhance gameplay, introducing both entertainment and a subtle eerie ambiance. 
Among the notable additions are:

- Ores and smelting
    - Mythic Metals
    - Advanced netherite
    - Alloy forgery

  
- Combat
    - Better Combat
    - Soulslike Weaponry and simple swords
    - Spellblades and such (also including wizards and archers)
    - Plenty of new enchantments
    - New challenging mobs
    - Unlock Expert mode entering the Nether and initiate Master mode upon defeating the end dragon

- QOL Stuff
    - Trinkets
    - Vanity armor slots
    - Trinket Lantern
    - Woodcutter
    - In-game Mic
    - Inventory sorter 

- World Gen and Dimensions
    - Dungeon like structures with high tier loot and new biomes added
    - Alterations and enhancements to the Nether and End dimensions
    - Dungeon dimensions
    - Ad astra planets
    - Continents 
    - Terralith

- Atmosphere
    - Refined soundscapes
    - Ambient for immersion

- Misc
   - Create
   - Zenith enchantment system
   - EMI GUI that helps with discovering items and crafting recipes
   - Waystones
   - AE2
   - Hephaestus (Tinker's Construct) and addons

All settings are configured to be subtle yet noticeable, seamlessly blending into the experience without drawing undue attention.
- Quests and guide books will be added through out updates.
- Custom gui soon tm
#### Important

- TrinketLanterns isnt listed anywhere and can be found [here](https://github.com/AkashiiKun/TrinketLanterns 'GitHub')
- Title tracks are from [Ludocrypt](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/ 'Bandcamp') check them out!

<details>
<summary>Bug tracker</summary>

- Sometimes when creating a new world a crash would happen on the first time world load, then when trying to load the same world again itll load without problems.
- Any armor piece from the rpg series when placed in a trinket slot will crash the game


</details>


## **Performance** 


Despite its moderate-to-large size, this modpack runs smoothly, thanks to the integration of multiple performance-enhancing mods. Optimal performance is achieved by allocating approximately 8-16 GB of RAM.

And if you want to run this even better and with friends i recommend buying a 6-8gb server from Bisecthosting! Just make sure to use chunky to pre-generate your world if you play with more than 3 players!


Also depending your plan, adjusting Fabric Seasons could improve performance (Disable temperature in the config) should help a lot with performance if needed!

Here are the server files already configured - [Server files](https://github.com/tiigerbones/Eclipsed-Realms-Squared/releases/tag/Release 'GitHub')  **outdated**

Using code and link [TIIGERBONES](https://bisecthosting.com/TIIGERBONES 'Bisect Hosting') to get 25% off your first month
